title: Agent
description: A performer of Invocations — an Agent IS a Lifecycle parameterization (agency/_invoke.py, lifecycle.py, capabilities/delegate; Spec 153 Slice 6 coverage). Linked to its work via PERFORMED_BY.

runtime.description: Where the agent runs: 'external' (direct MCP/CLI caller), 'delegated' (sub-agent fan-out), or 'cloud-async' (Jules / remote lifecycle).
